leadText: The Tough Candy L (Japanese: まもりのアメＬ Defense Candy L) is a type of Candy in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Lv. 30 or higher Pokémon, it increases that Pokémon's Defense by 1 AV , up until it has reached 100 AVs in Defense.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E A big candy that is packed with energy. When given to a Pokémon Lv. 30 or higher, it will increase that Pokémon's Defense.
